notes: Positioning/copy only — no code, no protocol change, no version bump, casp check semantics untouched. README hero now leads with the sub-wedge 'CASP is the deterministic floor of the self-verification loop — the one check in verify-your-work that isn't the model checking itself', beneath the unchanged evergreen H1. 'gate' demoted from headline metaphor to mechanical descriptor (exit-code gate, pre-push gate, gate-not-harness) — no blind replace. The 18-language casp-website propagation was deliberately deferred to its own session (PHASE-POSITIONING-SUBWEDGE-SITE.md) because a half-translated homepage breaks the drop-a-language-rather-than-ship-it-broken rule. Run node dist/cli.js check before push.
